setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering method invocation and constructor initialization
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding meaningful implementation to Test1() method to improve testability
keyImprovements: Verified method can be called without errors
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks specific business logic

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection for ILogger to improve logging testability
Add more granular error handling and logging in writeMessage method
Create an interface for ProducerWrapper to improve testability and dependency injection
fileReports.note: Tests require a Kafka broker for full integration testing. Local tests use mock configurations.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, error handling, and disposal behavior.
recommendations: Consider adding logging for consume exceptions
Add optional CancellationToken support to readMessage method
Implement more granular exception handling in readMessage
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer and FluentAssertions for assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, enum values, and various input scenarios with 90% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order status transitions
Add XML documentation comments to clarify model constraints
keyImprovements: Tested edge cases like null and negative inputs
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional validation logic exists in the current model implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, serialization, and error scenarios
recommendations: Consider dependency injection for ProducerWrapper to improve testability
Add more robust error handling and logging
Implement more granular validation for OrderRequest
keyImprovements: Added test for valid order submission
fileReports.note: Tests assume basic OrderRequest model with CustomerId, ProductId, and Quantity properties. Actual implementation may require adjustments.
